query: Lower the LoRA model strength to 0.5 to reduce the intensity of the stylization effect

desired.outcome: The LoRA influence is reduced by half, producing a more subtle stylization that lets the base model's characteristics show through more clearly.
desired.quality: The LoRA strength parameter is correctly located and updated to 0.5; all node connections remain intact and the workflow continues to generate complete videos.

_tags.author_rationale: This pinpoints the key LoRA parameter unique to this workflow, forcing the agent to locate it among Wan Alpha/Hunyuan nodes rather than making a vague quality tweak.
